name: @tootallnate/bfres
description: Parser for Nintendo's BFRES (Binary Cafe Resource) format — the master 3D resource container used by NintendoWare across Wii U / Switch first-party games. Walks the FMDL / FSKA / FMAA / FVIS / FSHU / FSCN sub-file dicts and surfaces an embedded BNTX texture bank as a plain Blob, ready to feed to @tootallnate/bntx for actual texture decode.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
